changelog: URGENT FIX: searching a series and opening it now correctly resolves to the right Xtream entry — episodes show as playable rows again instead of as REQUEST rows. Auto-walks duplicate series_id entries until it finds the one with episodes loaded.
Cleaner top bar: removed the layout-hint chip and expiry badge from the right side. Sidebar expiry pill removed too. Subscription info is still on Settings → Subscription.
